description: original — Coverage/Specificity/Sections 3/3 (finds all 9 answer-key gaps/input, well above the ≥6 floor); Lean 0/3 (~1500-1700 tok) + Focused 0/3 (cross-section gap duplication + multi-line per-item padding). Huge feature-preserving budget headroom

output budget (one line/gap, no cross-section dup, Priority names-not-restates) — Lean 0/3->3/3 (~382-462 tok, ~70% leaner), Focused 0/3->3/3, Coverage held (FG1 8/9, FG2 7/9, FG3 8/9, all >=6 floor). coverage-exhaustive + strict Nice=new-only. Best feature preservation: 26/27 gaps (FG1 9/9, FG2 8/9, FG3 9/9) vs exp1 23/27; Focused 2/3 (cleaner dedup); Lean 2/3 (FG1 756 tok — gap-richest input exceeds 650 to hold full coverage; ~50% leaner there, 60-70% on FG2/FG3). Ties exp1 on score, wins the no-feature-loss tiebreaker -> KEEP
